function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0007
alias: helios_backfill_process_pack
issued_on: 2026-01-19
total_eur: 760
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 260
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 110
---
# Helios process pack invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0007                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_process_pack   |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-19                     |
| total_eur      | 760                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit  | 1   | 260      | 260      |
| 2 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 3 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 110      | 110      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 760      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the middle phase when the work started looking like an actual office deliverable set.

next_step.current_state: Write succeeded for target invoice with frontmatter and preserved body. Reactive outbox check is not applicable because no outbox/communication record was written. Next complete inbox workflow cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.

Completed full migration with required invoice schema fields and preserved original body verbatim below frontmatter, then deleted the inbox item per inbox-processing workflow. No missing items. Numeric consistency verified from source lines: 260+390+110=760, matching total_eur 760.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request successfully: added YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md using the finance invoice schema, preserved the original note body verbatim beneath the frontmatter, and deleted the handled inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, system workflow/schema guidance, inbox lane rule to process lowest filename, migration rule to preserve body exactly, and inbox v2 cleanup rule to delete inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly targeted one invoice file for OCR/frontmatter extraction. The target file contained all required invoice fields and line items, enabling schema-compliant frontmatter creation without guessing; body text was retained unchanged; then the inbox file was removed as required by the inbox processing workflow.
